OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Thomas Aqulinais present.
Attorney, Albert Loeb Boasberg is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Felix Alegria is present and appearing with Full Scope Attorney, Tina Yim.

The Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of September 24, 2012 remains on calendar.
